name: canvas-design
tagline: Writes a design-philosophy manifesto, then renders it as an original poster/art PDF or PNG using local or downloaded fonts.
verdict: Safe, compact creative skill with clear triggers and a concrete deliverable (philosophy .md + .pdf/.png). No negative-trigger scoping, no declared rendering toolchain, and no failure handling for the font-download step or canvas generation — a broken run has no documented recovery. No version/changelog signal either.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body despite adjacent skills (documents, general image gen) being plausible misfires.
Font sourcing at a load-bearing step names no source, tool, or selection criteria; local ./canvas-fonts search nearby is concrete, this fallback is not.
No mention anywhere of what to do if font download fails, canvas-fonts is empty, or PDF/PNG generation errors out.
